mapper.select: SELECT layout_id, layout_type, floor_area_sqm, robot_total FROM v_factories ORDER BY layout_id ASC
SELECT layout_id, layout_type, floor_area_sqm, robot_total FROM v_factory_info WHERE layout_id = #{layoutId}
SELECT layout_id, scenario_id FROM v_scenarios WHERE layout_id = #{layoutId} ORDER BY scenario_id ASC
SELECT layout_id, scenario_id, snapshot_time, avg_delay_minutes_next_30m FROM v_dashboard_shipping_delay WHERE layout_id = #{layoutId} AND scenario_id = #{scenarioId} ORDER BY snapshot_time ASC
SELECT layout_id, scenario_id, snapshot_time, order_inflow_15m FROM v_dashboard_order_inflow WHERE layout_id = #{layoutId} AND scenario_id = #{scenarioId} ORDER BY snapshot_time ASC

SELECT layout_id, scenario_id, snapshot_time, robot_active, robot_idle, robot_charging, avg_idle_duration_min FROM v_dashboard_robot_summary WHERE layout_id = #{layoutId} AND scenario_id = #{scenarioId} ORDER BY snapshot_time ASC
SELECT layout_id, scenario_id, snapshot_time, congestion_score FROM v_dashboard_congestion WHERE layout_id = #{layoutId} AND scenario_id = #{scenarioId} ORDER BY snapshot_time ASC
